summary: Booking model tests call create() with missing arguments
steps_to_reproduce: Run booking model tests that call BookingModel.create(room_id, customer_id, check_in, check_out)
expected_result: Tests should match production function signature
actual_result: Updated test helper to pass num_guests and total_amount

summary: POST forms do not have CSRF token verification
steps_to_reproduce: Submit POST request from external origin without same-site form token
expected_result: Server should reject invalid POST with CSRF failure
actual_result: Added session-bound CSRF middleware and hidden token in all POST forms with integration tests

summary: Checkout flow can partially update data when one step fails
steps_to_reproduce: Trigger checkout with invalid payment method or DB error after status update
expected_result: Checkout should be atomic or rollback safely
actual_result: Added transactional BookingModel.checkout_booking with rollback on failure

summary: Date filter is inconsistent across report sections
steps_to_reproduce: Apply date range filter in reports page
expected_result: All report widgets should use the same date scope
actual_result: Applied start/end filters consistently for payments and top-room/recent-payment queries

summary: Email normalization inconsistent on customer update
steps_to_reproduce: Update customer email with mixed case value
expected_result: Stored email should be normalized to lowercase for consistent uniqueness
actual_result: Normalized customer email in CustomerModel.update path
